'''tashodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focusing|focusing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focusing|focusing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tashodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæshedheth|tæshedheth]] || [[word:tæshedhej|tæshedhej]] || [[word:tæshedhesh|tæshedhesh]] || [[word:tæshedhe|tæshedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashoshodhoth|tashoshodhoth]] || [[word:tashoshodhoj|tashoshodhoj]] || [[word:tashoshodhosh|tashoshodhosh]] || [[word:tashoshodho|tashoshodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashodhoth|tashodhoth]] || [[word:tashodhoj|tashodhoj]] || [[word:tashodhosh|tashodhosh]] || [[word:tashodho|tashodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashofdhoth|tashofdhoth]] || [[word:tashofdhoj|tashofdhoj]] || [[word:tashofdhosh|tashofdhosh]] || [[word:tashofdhof|tashofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tashodhotho|tashodhotho]] || [[word:tashodhojo|tashodhojo]] || [[word:tashodhosho|tashodhosho]] || [[word:tashodhoko|tashodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tashodhoth|tashodhoth]] || [[word:tashodhoj|tashodhoj]] || [[word:tashodhosh|tashodhosh]] || [[word:tashodho|tashodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tashodhothol|tashodhothol]] || [[word:tashodhojol|tashodhojol]] || [[word:tashodhoshol|tashodhoshol]] || [[word:tashodhokol|tashodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tashodhothotho|tashodhothotho]] || [[word:tashodhojojo|tashodhojojo]] || [[word:tashodhoshosho|tashodhoshosho]] || [[word:tashodhoko|tashodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tashodhothon|tashodhothon]] || [[word:tashodhojon|tashodhojon]] || [[word:tashodhoshon|tashodhoshon]] || [[word:tashodhokon|tashodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tashodhothoro|tashodhothoro]] || [[word:tashodhojoro|tashodhojoro]] || [[word:tashodhoshoro|tashodhoshoro]] || [[word:tashodhokoro|tashodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
